prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild scene, Mika Ashbell, a feminine adventurer in reinforced leather armor and a short cloak, leans over a wooden counter to point at a map, gesturing seriously to Mika Oakspire, an androgynous quartermaster in a neat vest and guild sash. The room is warm and bustling, cinematic lighting, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Mika Oakspire nods in professional agreement, picks up a quill, and carefully records the details into a heavy leather-bound ledger while Mika Ashbell watches with a determined expression, maintaining consistent character appearances and camera angle, no text, no watermark.
